impact: This proves committed PP&D Playwright audit-event fixtures stay redacted and reject private auth state, cookies, traces, screenshots, raw browser storage, uploads, submissions, payments, certifications, cancellations, MFA, CAPTCHA, and inspection scheduling actions before any live DevHub automation exists.
summary: Add fixture-only validation for sensitive Playwright audit-event rejection cases.
target_task: Task checkbox-82: Task checkbox-77: Add validation proving Playwright audit-event fixtures reject private auth state, cookies, traces, screenshots, raw browser storage, uploads, submissions, payments, certifications, cancellations, MFA, CAPTCHA, and inspection scheduling actions.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
